svg.text: ECO-SIM: Harpy Eagle × Capuchin Monkey - Apex Predation & Alarm Cascade Clock
Seasonal patch isolation · Hunting pressure · Multi-species alarm propagation

g.text: Harpia harpyja holds a 30–100 km² territory;
and higher eagle success at patch boundaries.
Dry season: capuchins range expands; visible.
Eagle detected: alarm cascade reaches Seriema,
